response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong distributed systems expertise and recent exposure to AI agent tooling. However, he fundamentally lacks the executive leadership background required for a CTO role, specifically the hard requirements of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people and operating complex multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes, regulated fintech environments.
strengths: Extensive 15+ year background in backend development and high-throughput distributed systems.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) workflows.
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and building event-driven platforms.
concerns: No executive-level engineering leadership or track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks production experience operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated financial environments.
No demonstrated experience managing hybrid engineering models or external delivery partners.
